## ClawDoc Pull Request

### What does this PR do?
<!-- Brief description of the change -->

### What skill or reference doc does it touch?
<!-- e.g., openclaw-memory/SKILL.md, references/gateway-config.md -->

### Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter description is updated if needed
- [ ] SKILL.md body is accurate and actionable (not just surface knowledge)
- [ ] Reference docs added/updated are from the official OpenClaw docs
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, or local system paths in the change
- [ ] All example configs use placeholder values (not real keys)
- [ ] README updated if this adds new skills or changes coverage scope

### Testing
<!-- How did you verify this works? -->

- [ ] Asked ClawDoc the question this change is meant to improve — answer is correct
- [ ] Ran `openclaw skills add /path/to/clawdoc/skills` to test locally
- [ ] Verified no local paths (`/data/.openclaw/`, etc.) in the change
